notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Brent Rooker out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Denzel Clarke to 3rd. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Denzel Clarke to 3rd. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón reaches on a fielder's choice. Dominic Smith to 2nd. Dominic Smith advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.
